Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Large national distributor with 169-day overdue invoice; reduce DSO to 45 days and require prepayment on new orders until #4460 resolves.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Major retailer chain now 14 days overdue; tighten to 30 days and escalate collections immediately.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer 60 days overdue; standard EU export DSO is 45–60 days, but payment friction suggests 35-day terms with prepay option.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Own Ba.reason: Highest-priority cash source; enforce same-day or next-day settlement to protect minimum liquidity.

alerts.message: Invoice #4460 (€18,484) is 170 days overdue. Escalate to senior management and legal immediately; freeze all shipments until payment or arrangement agreed.
Total overdue AR is €76,333 (43 invoices), representing 38% of open AR. Fixed monthly costs (€62,781) cannot be met this month if overdue payments do not arrive by week 2 of May.
Bemböle contract ends September 2026 (€25K/month recurring revenue). Begin diversification and new customer acquisition now to offset €300K annual revenue gap.
Invoice #5750 (€3,296) is 14 days overdue. Contact within 24 hours; if unresolved in 5 days, withhold next shipment pending payment.
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 975 days overdue (since Aug 2024). Write down or pursue debt recovery; this is a sunk loss unless legal action is viable.
Open POs (€79,996) combined with €76,333 overdue payables create 8–10 week cash timing mismatch; reduce new POs to 50% of current level until overdue AR recovers.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882) is 287 days overdue. Verify if account is active; if dormant, write down; if active, escalate collections.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: Overdue AR (€76K) and pending POs (€80K) create a 6–8 week funding gap; April payroll and loan payments (€62,781) are at risk without immediate collections from Alko, Kesko, and My Dear Beer.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy today to demand payment or 7-day resolution plan for €18,484 overdue #4460; simultaneously contact Kesko to confirm Kesko Oyj status on €3,296 #5750 and escalate collections if no ETA provided.
pattern_insights: Export customers (My Dear Beer, Wittich Weine, Made in Poland, Gig Linden) show consistent 30–60 day slippage beyond terms; 62% YoY growth is outpacing DSO management and export payment discipline.
Bemböle contract cliff (Sept 2026) will erase €300K annual revenue; without new customer wins, 62% growth will reverse sharply and leave fixed costs (€62,781/mo) unsustainable.
insights.wc_note: Growth-stage cash crisis: 62% YoY expansion with 6–8 week export DSO is consuming working capital faster than collections arrive; overdue AR of 38% signals customer concentration risk (Alko, Kesko, Bemböle) and weak credit management relative to scale.
